entries.claim: RestoreLocal reads archived content through StoreArchive and writes only under the controlled restore-local root.
entries.command: cargo remote -c -- test -p isyncyou-app-host --features agent-oauth-providers restore_local -- --nocapture
entries.evidence: Focused restore_local AppHost tests passed during Task 3; restore output was constrained to .isyncyou-agent/restore-local and used archived/envelope-aware body reads.

entries.claim: Confirmed Backup routes through the shared backup runner and records the backup run.
entries.command: cargo remote -c -- test -p isyncyou-app-host --features agent-oauth-providers agent_backup_ -- --nocapture
entries.evidence: Focused agent_backup_ AppHost tests passed during Task 4; selected services are validated before token lookup and refresh_cache_account_filtered receives the expected service set.

entries.claim: Confirmed RestoreCloud routes through the existing engine restore semantics instead of a new raw mutation path.
entries.command: cargo remote -c -- test -p isyncyou-app-host --features agent-oauth-providers agent_restore_cloud -- --nocapture
entries.evidence: Focused agent_restore_cloud AppHost tests passed during Task 5; service support and cloud_restore_enabled are checked before cached restore-token lookup.

entries.claim: Confirmed LiveWrite uses existing service writer dispatch with strict service/verb parsing.
entries.command: cargo remote -c -- test -p isyncyou-app-host --features agent-oauth-providers agent_live_write -- --nocapture
entries.evidence: Focused agent_live_write AppHost tests passed during Task 7; mail, calendar, contacts, todo, and onenote dispatch cases route through the existing writer-trait seam.

entries.claim: Confirmed Share routes through DaemonShare and the ledger-backed #722 link/invite handler, including organization-scope links.
entries.command: cargo remote -c -- test -p isyncyou-app-host --features agent-oauth-providers agent_share -- --nocapture
entries.evidence: Focused agent_share AppHost tests passed during Task 6; link and invite intents are validated before pending registration and execution uses the ShareHandler seam.

entries.claim: Mobile destructive Agent confirmation remains fail-closed for #624.
entries.command: cargo remote -c -- test -p isyncyou-app-host --features agent-oauth-providers agent_confirm_ -- --nocapture
entries.evidence: The agent_confirm_ AppHost filter passed during Task 8; MobileDisabledAgentOperations returns not_available_on_mobile and records only started/error audit states.

entries.claim: The confirm endpoint revalidates stored PendingActions before execution and rejects malformed destructive actions.
entries.command: cargo remote -c -- test -p isyncyou-app-host --features agent-oauth-providers agent_confirm_ -- --nocapture
entries.evidence: The revalidation test registers a malformed live-write PendingAction directly and proves confirm returns invalid_confirmed_action without executing or auditing it.

entries.claim: Read-class actions cannot execute through the confirmed destructive-action path.
entries.command: cargo remote -c -- test -p isyncyou-app-host --features agent-oauth-providers agent_confirm_ -- --nocapture
entries.evidence: The read-class confirm test registers a search action directly and proves confirm rejects it as not_confirmable without executor or audit calls.

entries.claim: Confirmed-operation API summaries are JSON and centrally redacted even if an executor returns raw URL or email text.
entries.command: cargo remote -c -- test -p isyncyou-app-host --features agent-oauth-providers agent_confirm_ -- --nocapture
entries.evidence: The JSON/redaction test parses the confirm response as JSON and verifies raw URL/email text is replaced with redacted placeholders.

entries.claim: The desktop confirmed executor block does not call raw GraphClient mutation methods directly.
entries.evidence: Static source test passed during Task 7; DesktopAgentOperations dispatches to operation runners/handlers rather than GraphClient or direct share mutation calls.

entries.claim: A confirmed Agent live-write can create and clean up a Microsoft Graph mail draft only after PendingAction confirmation, while public stream input is redacted.
entries.command: cargo remote -b ISY624_M365_WRITE_TOKEN=<redacted> -c -- test -p isyncyou-app-host --features agent-oauth-providers -- --ignored live_issue_624_agent_confirm_
entries.evidence: The ignored live test used a real Mail.ReadWrite token, observed a redacted public tool_call, confirmed the pending action, received a draft id, and deleted the draft in cleanup.

entries.claim: A confirmed Agent share action can create and clean up a direct OneDrive anonymous view link only after PendingAction confirmation, while public stream input remains redacted.
entries.command: cargo remote -b ISY624_M365_WRITE_TOKEN=<redacted> -c -- test -p isyncyou-app-host --features agent-oauth-providers -- --ignored live_issue_624_agent_confirm_
entries.evidence: The ignored live test used a real Files.ReadWrite token, created a temporary OneDrive item, confirmed the pending share action, verified a direct non-inherited anonymous view permission, then deleted the permission and item.

entries.claim: The missing Backup live confirmation probe has been added and compile-checked, but it was not executed because no live Microsoft 365 token seed was available in this shell.
entries.command: cargo remote -c -- test -p isyncyou-app-host --features agent-oauth-providers live_issue_624_agent_confirm_ --no-run
entries.evidence: The ignored live Backup probe builds. ISY624_M365_WRITE_TOKEN_FILE and ISY624_M365_WRITE_TOKEN were unset, and no local #624 token cache was found, so this is not counted as a live PASS.

entries.claim: The missing RestoreCloud live confirmation probe has been added and compile-checked, but it was not executed because no live Microsoft 365 token seed was available in this shell.
entries.command: cargo remote -c -- test -p isyncyou-app-host --features agent-oauth-providers live_issue_624_agent_confirm_ --no-run
entries.evidence: The ignored live RestoreCloud probe builds. It seeds a synthetic archived mail body, confirms restore-cloud through DesktopAgentOperations, verifies the new Graph message, deletes it, and checks the committed restore ledger row when executed with a real token.

entries.claim: The remaining Backup and RestoreCloud live confirmations are still blocked in this session by missing Microsoft 365 token seeds.
entries.command: for v in ISY624_M365_WRITE_TOKEN_FILE ISY624_M365_WRITE_TOKEN ISY624_M365_DRAFT_TO; do if [ -n "${!v:-}" ]; then echo "$v=set"; else echo "$v=unset"; fi; done
entries.evidence: ISY624_M365_WRITE_TOKEN_FILE=unset; ISY624_M365_WRITE_TOKEN=unset; ISY624_M365_DRAFT_TO=unset. No .isyncyou-token-*.json or #624 M365 token seed was found under the checked local config/tmp/workspace paths. Do not claim Backup or RestoreCloud live AC completion from this session.

entries.claim: The saved #624 plan was reloaded and checked against the implemented branch; live-matrix gaps are documented rather than overclaimed.
entries.command: wc -l docs/security/issue-624-desktop-operations-agent-plan.md; gh issue view 624 --repo silentspike/isyncyou --json state,title,labels
entries.evidence: The plan was re-read at 924 lines after implementation. LiveWrite and Share have live Graph confirmation probes. Backup and RestoreCloud now have ignored live probes that compile, but this session did not have token seeds to execute them.
